title: Honest diagnosis
body: Imaging-led examinations and second-opinion friendliness — we'll tell you when you don't need treatment.

title: Sterile by default
body: Single-use disposables, autoclaved instruments and ISO-aligned protocols on every chair, every patient.

title: Same doctors, every visit
body: No rotating residents. Continuity of care from consultation through to follow-up and maintenance.

title: Transparent pricing
body: Itemised treatment plans shared up front, with cashless insurance and EMI options where applicable.
